description: You are a marketing analyst creating a product performance tiering report. Using the data from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv', create a Power BI report named 'Product_Tier_Report.pbix' at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\'. The report should include a calculated column 'Product_Rank' ranking 'Product_Category' by 'Sales_Amount' (descending) and a calculated column 'Performance_Tier' labeling Rank 1 as 'Top', Ranks 2-3 as 'Mid', and Rank 4 as 'Low'. Implement DAX measures 'Tier_Revenue' (Sum of Sales_Amount) and 'Avg_Discount' (Average of Discount). The dashboard must feature a 100% Stacked Bar Chart (Region on Y-axis, Tier_Revenue on X-axis, Performance_Tier as Legend), a Multi-Row Card (displaying Tier_Revenue and Avg_Discount), and a Table (showing Product_Category, Product_Rank, Performance_Tier, and Tier_Revenue).
